response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of software development experience with strong full-stack background spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB — directly aligned with the primary stack. Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and broad polyglot experience including Java. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or cloud/Kubernetes depth shown, and German is only basic which may matter for Berlin-based collaboration.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React and MongoDB matching primary stack
Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly fits the AI agent requirement
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, and OSS contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, both listed in primary stack
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java in recent roles and no clear cloud/Kubernetes production depth
Resume oddity: all roles list 'Kenya' as location despite Berlin base — raises data-quality questions
